media-validator.description: Validate media files (MP4, PNG, TXT) via OCR/metadata/pattern matching for PASS/FAIL with evidence (§11.4.164)

open-design.description: OpenDesign MCP server for UI design system (§11.4.162). Bridges the agent to the OpenDesign daemon (nexu-io/open-design) on localhost:7456. Start the daemon first: `node apps/daemon/dist/cli.js --port 7456 --no-open` from a from-source checkout, or the desktop app / `docker compose up` in deploy/ (fixed :7456). od_generate_design additionally needs operator BYOK env (HELIX_OD_BYOK_* in .env, §11.4.10) — the read/list/create/get/lint tools do not.
